test_desc: Smoke - Navigate to PO list page
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/purchase-order/po; Wait for page to fully load; Verify page title displays 'Purchase Orders'
expected_result: Purchase order list page loads successfully; Data table is visible with columns for PO number
column11: total amount; 'Create PO' or 'Add Purchase Order' button is visible and enabled; Status filter tabs or dropdown is available

test_desc: Smoke - Create a new purchase order with line items
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/purchase-order/po/add; Select supplierId dropdown value 'PT Elektronik Jaya' (SUP-001); Select locationId dropdown value 'Main Street Flagship Store' (LOC-SHOP-001); Fill orderDate field with '2026-04-04'; Fill expectedDeliveryDate field with '2026-04-18'; Fill notes field with 'Initial stock order for store opening'; In the line items section click 'Add Item'; Select productId for 'Wireless Mouse' (SKU-ELEC-0001); Verify skuCode auto-fills with 'SKU-ELEC-0001'; Verify productName auto-fills with 'Wireless Mouse'; Fill quantity with '100'; Verify unitPrice auto-fills from supplier price '70000'; Fill discountPercent with '0'; Verify uom shows 'pcs'; Verify line total calculates as 7000000; Click Submit or Save as Draft button; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Purchase order is created successfully with status='draft'; Auto-generated PO number follows format PO-202604-NNNN; Line item shows correct calculations: quantity=100, unitPrice=70000, discountPercent=0, lineTotal=7000000; Subtotal=7000000; Tax (11% PPN) calculates as 770000 (since product is taxApplicable); Grand total=7770000; Success notification appears; User is redirected to PO detail or list page

test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/purchase-order/po; Locate the newly created PO; Click on the PO row or click 'View' action button
expected_result: PO detail page opens; Header shows: PO number (PO-202604-XXXX), supplier='PT Elektronik Jaya', location='Main Street Flagship Store', orderDate='2026-04-04', expectedDeliveryDate='2026-04-18', status='draft', notes displayed; Line items table shows: Wireless Mouse, qty=100, unitPrice=70000, discount=0%, lineTotal=7000000; Summary shows subtotal=7000000, tax=770000, grandTotal=7770000; Action buttons available: Edit, Submit for Approval, Cancel

test_desc: Full CRUD - Add multiple line items to PO
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/purchase-order/po; Locate the draft PO; Click 'Edit' action button; In line items section click 'Add Item'; Select productId for 'Mechanical Keyboard' (SKU-ELEC-0002); Fill quantity with '50'; Verify unitPrice shows supplier price or fill with '420000'; Fill discountPercent with '5'; Verify uom shows 'pcs'; Verify line total calculates as 50 * 420000 * 0.95 = 19950000; Click Save button; Wait for success notification
expected_result: PO now has two line items; Line 1: Wireless Mouse, qty=100, unitPrice=70000, discount=0%, lineTotal=7000000; Line 2: Mechanical Keyboard, qty=50, unitPrice=420000, discount=5%, lineTotal=19950000; Subtotal=26950000; Tax (11% PPN) recalculated on taxable items; Grand total updated accordingly; Success notification appears

test_desc: Full CRUD - Edit a line item quantity and discount
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/purchase-order/po; Locate the draft PO; Click 'Edit'; In line items find 'Wireless Mouse'; Change quantity from '100' to '150'; Change discountPercent from '0' to '2'; Verify line total recalculates as 150 * 70000 * 0.98 = 10290000; Click Save; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Line item updated: Wireless Mouse now shows qty=150, discount=2%, lineTotal=10290000; Subtotal and grand total are recalculated; Mechanical Keyboard line remains unchanged; Success notification appears

test_desc: Full CRUD - Remove a line item
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/purchase-order/po; Locate the draft PO; Click 'Edit'; In line items find 'Mechanical Keyboard'; Click 'Remove' or 'Delete' button on that line item; Confirm removal if prompted; Click Save; Wait for success notification
expected_result: Mechanical Keyboard line item is removed; PO now has only one line item (Wireless Mouse); Subtotal, tax, and grand total are recalculated based on remaining items only; Success notification appears

test_desc: Full CRUD - Submit PO for approval (status draft to pending_approval)
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/purchase-order/po; Locate the draft PO; Click 'Submit for Approval' button; Confirm submission in dialog if prompted; Wait for status change notification
expected_result: PO status changes from 'draft' to 'pending_approval'; Status badge updates to show 'Pending Approval'; Edit button becomes disabled or hidden (PO cannot be modified while pending approval); The PO appears in the approval engine's pending approvals list at /console/modules/approval-engine/pending; Notification sent to approver (if notification system exists)

test_desc: Full CRUD - Approve PO (status pending_approval to approved)
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/approval-engine/pending (logged in as approver role); Locate the PO in pending approvals list; Click 'Approve' button; Optionally fill approval comment with 'Approved for Q2 stock'; Click Confirm; Wait for success notification; Navigate to /console/modules/purchase-order/po; Locate the PO
expected_result: PO status changes from 'pending_approval' to 'approved'; Approval record is created in approval history; PO detail shows approved status with approver name and timestamp; 'Send to Supplier' button becomes available; PO is no longer in pending approvals list

test_desc: Full CRUD - Send PO to supplier (status approved to sent)
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/purchase-order/po; Locate the approved PO; Click 'Send to Supplier' or 'Mark as Sent' button; Confirm action; Wait for success notification
expected_result: PO status changes from 'approved' to 'sent'; Status badge updates to 'Sent'; Sent date/timestamp is recorded; PDF download button becomes available or PDF is auto-generated; Amendment tracking begins from this point

test_desc: Full CRUD - Partially receive PO (status sent to partially_received)
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/purchase-order/po; Locate the sent PO; Click 'Receive Goods' or 'Record Receipt' button; In the receiving form for 'Wireless Mouse' (ordered 150): Fill received quantity with '80'; Click Save Receipt; Wait for success notification
expected_result: PO status changes from 'sent' to 'partially_received'; Line item shows: ordered=150, received=80, remaining=70; Status badge shows 'Partially Received'; The 'Receive Goods' action remains available for recording further receipts; Receipt timestamp is recorded

test_desc: Full CRUD - Fully receive PO (status partially_received to fully_received)
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/purchase-order/po; Locate the partially received PO; Click 'Receive Goods' button; For 'Wireless Mouse': Fill received quantity with '70' (remaining balance); Click Save Receipt; Wait for success notification
expected_result: PO status changes from 'partially_received' to 'fully_received'; Line item shows: ordered=150, received=150, remaining=0; All items fully received; Status badge shows 'Fully Received'; 'Close PO' action becomes available

test_desc: Full CRUD - Close PO (status fully_received to closed)
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/purchase-order/po; Locate the fully received PO; Click 'Close PO' button; Confirm closure; Wait for success notification
expected_result: PO status changes from 'fully_received' to 'closed'; Status badge shows 'Closed'; No further actions available except View and PDF download; PO is now a historical record; Closed timestamp is recorded

test_desc: Full CRUD - Filter POs by status
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/purchase-order/po; Click or select status filter 'draft'; Observe results; Select status filter 'closed'; Observe results; Select status filter 'All'; Observe results
expected_result: Draft filter: Only POs with status='draft' appear; Closed filter: Only POs with status='closed' appear; All filter: All POs regardless of status appear; Filter counts are accurate; Switching filters refreshes the table correctly

test_desc: Full CRUD - Search POs by PO number or supplier
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/purchase-order/po; Type the PO number (e.g., 'PO-202604') in the search field; Observe filtered results; Clear search; Type supplier name 'Elektronik' in search field; Observe results
expected_result: Search by PO number: Only POs matching the number pattern appear; Search by supplier name: POs for 'PT Elektronik Jaya' appear; Search is case-insensitive; Results update as user types or after pressing Enter

test_desc: Full CRUD - Download PO as PDF
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/purchase-order/po; Locate a PO with status 'sent' or later; Click 'Download PDF' or 'Print' button; Wait for PDF to generate and download
expected_result: PDF file is downloaded successfully; PDF contains: PO number, supplier details, location details, order date, expected delivery date, line items table with product names, SKUs, quantities, prices, discounts, line totals; Summary section with subtotal, tax breakdown (11% PPN), grand total; PDF is properly formatted and printable

test_desc: Edge Case - Cancel PO with reason (any pre-received status to cancelled)
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/purchase-order/po/add; Create a new PO: Select supplier 'PT Elektronik Jaya'; Select a valid location; Fill dates; Add one line item with valid product, qty=10, unitPrice=100000; Click Save as Draft; Wait for success; Locate the new draft PO; Click 'Cancel PO' button; Fill cancellation reason with 'Supplier unable to fulfill order within required timeframe'; Click Confirm Cancel; Wait for notification
expected_result: PO status changes to 'cancelled'; Cancellation reason is stored and displayed on PO detail; Cancelled timestamp is recorded; PO cannot be edited, approved, or sent after cancellation; PO remains visible in list with 'Cancelled' status badge; Line items are preserved for audit but no further processing is possible

test_desc: Edge Case - Amendment tracking after PO is sent
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/purchase-order/po; Locate a sent PO (create one if needed by going through draft->pending_approval->approved->sent workflow); Click 'Request Amendment' or 'Edit' (if amendments are allowed on sent POs); Change quantity of a line item; Add a note explaining the amendment; Click Save Amendment; Wait for notification
expected_result: If amendments are supported: An amendment record is created tracking the change (old value, new value, reason, timestamp, user); Amendment history is visible on PO detail page; PO may revert to 'pending_approval' status for re-approval; If amendments are not supported on sent POs: An error message indicates the PO cannot be modified in its current status

test_desc: Edge Case - Reorder suggestions stub page
test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/purchase-order/suggestions; Wait for page to load; Observe the page content
expected_result: Reorder suggestions page loads; Page either shows: (a) a stub/placeholder message indicating this feature is under development or coming soon, (b) a basic list of products that may need reordering based on stock levels (if partially implemented), or (c) an empty state with explanation of what suggestions will provide; The page does not throw errors; Navigation back to PO list works correctly
